461 N0350B_INSLN_ORDR_DAY_NUM N0350B_INSLN_ORDR_DAY_NUM N0350B Number of Days Insulin Orders Changed CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the number of days the physician (or authorized assistant or practitioner) changed the resident's insulin orders in the past seven days or since admission/entry or reentry if less than seven days. 0 Minimum
7 Maximum
- Not assessed/no
